.github/workflows/CI.yaml.general_idea: Update the Java version in the CI workflow from 17 to 21 to match the target JDK migration.
.github/workflows/CI.yaml.why_exists: The project is migrating to JDK 21; running tests on JDK 17 would not validate compatibility with the new target runtime.

pom.xml.general_idea: Update the Maven compiler release target from Java 17 to Java 21 to align with the new JDK version.
pom.xml.why_exists: Without this change, the project compiles for Java 17, failing to utilize Java 21 features and potentially causing runtime incompatibilities if Java 21-specific APIs are used.

src/main/java/io/camunda/connector/inbou.general_idea: Update InboundConnector annotation attributes to use new naming conventions and type format.
src/main/java/io/camunda/connector/inbou.why_exists: Connector SDK 8.4.4 likely enforces stricter naming or type validation, or the old format is deprecated/removed.

src/main/java/io/camunda/connector/inbou.general_idea: Add generic type parameter to InboundConnectorExecutable implementation.
src/main/java/io/camunda/connector/inbou.why_exists: The SDK interface likely became generic in the new version, requiring the implementation to specify the context type to compile.

src/main/java/io/camunda/connector/inbou.general_idea: Refactor property binding to use new SDK API method bindProperties.
src/main/java/io/camunda/connector/inbou.why_exists: The old methods getPropertiesAsType, replaceSecrets, and validate are likely removed or deprecated in the new SDK version.

src/main/java/io/camunda/connector/inbou.general_idea: Update property accessors to use Java record-style getter methods.
src/main/java/io/camunda/connector/inbou.why_exists: The MyConnectorProperties class likely changed from using standard getters (getSender) to record-style accessors (sender) in the new SDK.

src/main/java/io/camunda/connector/inbou.general_idea: Migrate validation annotations from javax.validation to jakarta.validation namespace.
src/main/java/io/camunda/connector/inbou.why_exists: javax.validation package is removed in Jakarta EE 9+ and incompatible with modern Spring Boot 3 / Connector SDK versions that rely on jakarta.validation.

src/main/java/io/camunda/connector/inbou.general_idea: Migrate validation annotations from javax.validation to jakarta.validation namespace.
src/main/java/io/camunda/connector/inbou.why_exists: javax.validation package is removed in Jakarta EE 9+ and incompatible with modern Spring Boot 3 / Connector SDK versions that rely on jakarta.validation.

src/main/java/io/camunda/connector/inbou.general_idea: Migrate validation annotations from javax.validation to jakarta.validation namespace.
src/main/java/io/camunda/connector/inbou.why_exists: javax.validation package is removed in Jakarta EE 9+ and incompatible with modern Spring Boot 3 / Connector SDK versions that rely on jakarta.validation.

src/test/resources/application.propertie.general_idea: Update Zeebe client configuration property to use the new namespace introduced in recent Connector SDK versions.
src/test/resources/application.propertie.why_exists: The old property 'zeebe.broker.gateway-address' is deprecated or ignored in newer SDK versions, causing the client to fail to connect to the broker at runtime.
